name: Blue Ribbon Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 medium apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, 2 cups of sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, oil, orange juice, and vanilla extract. Add this to the flour mixture and mix well.
3. Toss apples with cinnamon and remaining sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Spread one-third of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan. Top with half the apples. Repeat layers.
5. Carefully spread remaining batter over apples.
6. Bake at 350°F for 55-65 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan for 15 minutes before removing to a wire rack; cool completely.
8. Dust with powdered sugar.
